textByHash.685bf6084156e01e84de95ae0fbff1fb030326a7: Now what rock would that be, exactly?
textByHash.b7f5742ed0c28a3aa040061405a4bda9ad6d78a4: No, no one knows. No one here, anyway. The only one I can think of is Rolad, a renowned scholar. He was part of Dondakan's team once, many years ago.
textByHash.b035964098225dc231e6288bb24abd2c25ad8a79: He left to explore the world. Learning by experience, or so he said. Me, I prefer a cold stout at home, but it takes all sorts.
textByHash.c335f99eecab8fac92abb76fe624f9bb89d7cb6b: I think he's currently with the Black Guard at Ice Mountain.
textByHash.6d85a89873aa41f85ee521a809ee2147aa433a8a: Why, what do you need them for?
textByHash.900a830750c76b6fbfec1eb32223a45b52a7fcf1: And you'd be the test subject? I mean, the cannonball?
textByHash.080b48614f0ea8b7e96a03c7460a6831b0cfcf38: [laugh], that I would like to see!
textByHash.1b00a05e2121ed46d0bfae755d3b0cc6a29c7c41: Here, take this. Khorvak sent it to me from White Wolf Mountain, kind of as a joke. It's incomplete, of course, doesn't mean anything without other parts.
textByHash.148ef8c150e874a30f0572c036748ab2a5bb3324: [laugh], he's always a laugh, that Khorvak. Shooting humans out of cannons!
textByHash.5247a79614972dd8eb926fc63104c6d7f6e85efa: You wouldn't be able to carry them anyway, so why ask for them?
textByHash.70dc64f41d9fa02e7206730b5b062e937db59bcd: Yes, and I already gave a part to you, remember?
textByHash.c7852f4526d0fbb8ab89b90d6944f1a91c743692: I wish you'd just leave me alone.
textByHash.d60126ed26b96c999ea11cab87f085ecd4626dfa: I was a great engineer once. Still am actually.
textByHash.9f66b01153320c9b6ba6d0b0a775f6e72d83f737: They just don't let me do the work I do best anymore.
textByHash.57d8f5aa985f89e7f1920cf5335b489c55587de4: I'm an assistant in this shop. I get all the lousy jobs too.
